required_operator_inputs: build a real deterministic app-level UI integration harness instead of relying on helper-only greens for user-facing behavior
design the harness so it can survive merge into mainline and later exercise the IDE, Science Mode, and related DX11/ImGui surfaces
keep the harness deterministic, professional, and broadly agent-usable rather than viewer-specific
treat Slice 2 preset work as design-only until the harness becomes mandatory workflow proof
forbidden_operator_prompts: ship a one-off viewer-only UI test hack and call the integration problem solved
treat screenshot-only smokes or helper-only state mutation as sufficient proof for user-facing UI changes
start preset implementation before the harness is mandatory and trusted
leave the harness as chat-only intent without checked-in plan and contract surfaces

required_acceptance_assertions.description: The UI integration harness foundation contract validates successfully
The UI integration harness foundation phased plan stays synchronized
